(German pronunciation: [[ˈluːtvɪçsˌfoːɐ̯ʃtat ˈʔiːzaʁˌfoːɐ̯ʃtat]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Ludwigsvorstod-Isarvorstod*) is one of the [boroughs of Munich](/wiki/Boroughs_of_Munich "Boroughs of Munich"), Germany.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Borough of Munich, Germany

Unsourced material may be challenged and [removed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden_of_evidence "Wikipedia:Verifiability"). *Find sources:* ["Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(June 2018)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/ea/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_02_%28Karte%29_-_Ludwigsvorstadt_-_Isarvorstadt.png/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_02_%28Karte%29_-_Ludwigsvorstadt_-_Isarvorstadt.png)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_02_(Karte)_-_Ludwigsvorstadt_-_Isarvorstadt.png)

Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt, location within Munich

**Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt** (German pronunciation: [[ˈluːtvɪçsˌfoːɐ̯ʃtat ˈʔiːzaʁˌfoːɐ̯ʃtat]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Ludwigsvorstod-Isarvorstod*) is one of the [boroughs of Munich](/wiki/Boroughs_of_Munich "Boroughs of Munich"), Germany.

It consists of the districts **Ludwigsvorstadt**, located south of [Munich Hauptbahnhof](/wiki/Munich_Hauptbahnhof "Munich Hauptbahnhof") and east of the [Theresienwiese](/wiki/Theresienwiese "Theresienwiese"), and **Isarvorstadt**, which is north-west of the River [Isar](/wiki/Isar "Isar") and southeast of Munich's [Old Town](/wiki/Altstadt-Lehel "Altstadt-Lehel"). The [Lindwurmstraße](/wiki/Lindwurmstra%C3%9Fe "Lindwurmstraße") serves as a divider for the two districts.

The [population](/wiki/Population "Population") is estimated to be 54,049, according to the 2015 [census](/wiki/Census "Census").

Benoit Blaser (The Greens) is the borough mayor since 2020, preceded by Andreas Klose (2019-2020) and Alexander Miklosy (2002-2018) (both Pink List).

## The borough

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: The borough")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/03/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Ludwigsvorstadt_%28Luftbild%29.jpg/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Ludwigsvorstadt_%28Luftbild%29.jpg)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Ludwigsvorstadt_(Luftbild).jpg)

Aerial view of Ludwigsvorstadt

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f8/G%C3%A4rtnerplatzviertel.jpg/250px-G%C3%A4rtnerplatzviertel.jpg)](/wiki/File:G%C3%A4rtnerplatzviertel.jpg)

Isarvorstadt (Gärtnerplatzviertel)

The Ludwigsvorstadt district encompasses the quarters of St. Paul and Ludwigsvorstadt-Kliniken, while the district of Isarvorstadt is composed of the Schlachthofviertel, Drei-Mühlen-Viertel, Am alten Südfriedhof, the Glockenbachviertel, the Gärtnerplatzviertel, and Am Deutschen Museum.

### St. Paul

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: St. Paul")]

The St. Paul quarter, located immediately to the East of the [Theresienwiese](/wiki/Theresienwiese "Theresienwiese"), the site of Munich's yearly [Oktoberfest](/wiki/Oktoberfest "Oktoberfest"), is centered on [St. Paul's Church](/wiki/St._Paul%27s_Church,_Munich "St. Paul's Church, Munich"), a neogothic Catholic church from the turn of the 20th century. St. Paul, especially along the Bavariaring, an orbital road circling Theresienwiese, and along the Kaiser-Ludwig-Platz, is considered one of Munich's more upscale neighbourhoods, although many residential buildings have since been converted to office space. The Goethestraße to the east serves as a divider between St. Paul and the neighbouring Ludwigsvorstadt/Kliniken quarter.

The quarter is served by the U4 and U5 subway lines at [Theresienwiese station](/wiki/Theresienwiese_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Theresienwiese (Munich U-Bahn)") in the north and U3 and U6 lines at [Goetheplatz](/wiki/Goetheplatz_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Goetheplatz (Munich U-Bahn)") and [Poccistraße stations](/wiki/Poccistra%C3%9Fe_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Poccistraße (Munich U-Bahn)"). On the northern edge of the quarter, the tramway lines 18 and 19 call along Bayerstraße.

### Ludwigsvorstadt/Kliniken

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Ludwigsvorstadt/Kliniken")]

This quarter is actually made up of two distinct quarters, unofficially called *Bahnhofsviertel* and *Klinikviertel*. The Bahnhofsviertel is located directly south of [Munich Hauptbahnhof](/wiki/Munich_Hauptbahnhof "Munich Hauptbahnhof"), the city's main train station. It has popularly been called *Little Istanbul*, because of the large concentration of Turkish supermarkets, eateries, and shops along Landwehrstraße and the northern part of Goethestraße.
The south of the quarter is dominated by the Klinkikum Innenstadt, one of the major hospitals attached to the [Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität](/wiki/Ludwig-Maximilians-Universit%C3%A4t "Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität"). However, there are plans to move the largest part of the hospital to the university campus in [Großhadern](/wiki/Gro%C3%9Fhadern "Großhadern"), a borough in the south-west of Munich, and to convert the former hospital buildings to residential and office developments. Given its proximity to Munich's Old Town, the hospital buildings are considered prime developing space. There is a park along Lindwurmstraße towards [Sendlinger Tor](/wiki/Sendlinger_Tor "Sendlinger Tor"). The area is served by subway lines U3, U6, U1, and U2 at the [Sendlinger Tor interchange](/wiki/Sendlinger_Tor_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Sendlinger Tor (Munich U-Bahn)").

### Am Schlachthof

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Am Schlachthof")]

The Schlachthofviertel takes its name from the City of Munich's slaughterhouse, located in the east of the quarter. While slaughtering is no longer the main focus on the Schlachthof, the area is still home to a large number of butchers and food emporiums.

It is bounded to the north-west by Lindwurmstraße, to the north by Kapuzinerstraße, to the east by Thalkirchner Straße, and to the south by the railway tracks of the [Deutsche Bahn](/wiki/Deutsche_Bahn "Deutsche Bahn") [South Ring](/wiki/Munich_South_Ring "Munich South Ring").

Increasingly, the space around the Schlachthof has been taken up by up-start small businesses and artists. Each year, the Schlachthof hosts "Open Schlachthof", where artists open their ateliers to passers-by and display their art on the street. A small residential quarter is sandwiched between the Schlachthof and Lindwurmstraße to the west.

The area is served by the U3 and U6 lines at [Goetheplatz](/wiki/Goetheplatz_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Goetheplatz (Munich U-Bahn)") and [Poccistraße stations](/wiki/Poccistra%C3%9Fe_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Poccistraße (Munich U-Bahn)") as well as local bus services along Lagerhausstraße, Thalkirchner Straße, and Kapuzinerstraße.

The headquarters of the Munich branch of the [Arbeitsamt](/wiki/Arbeitsamt "Arbeitsamt") federal employment agency is located along Kapuzinerstraße.

### Dreimühlenviertel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Dreimühlenviertel")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/65/Strassenfest_in_der_Dreimuehlenstrasse_in_Muenchen_03.jpg/250px-Strassenfest_in_der_Dreimuehlenstrasse_in_Muenchen_03.jpg)](/wiki/File:Strassenfest_in_der_Dreimuehlenstrasse_in_Muenchen_03.jpg)

Street festival, Dreimühlenstreet, 2015

The Dreimühlenviertel is located directly to the east of the Schlachthofviertel and is bounded by the railway tracks to the south, the River [Isar](/wiki/Isar "Isar") to the east, and the Kapuzinerstraße to the north. It is residential in character, although numerous bars, cafés, and restaurants are located along Ehrengutstraße and Roecklplatz.

There is no subway station in the immediate vicinity, although the Metrobus on Kapuzinerstraße serves both Goetheplatz and [Kolumbusplatz stations](/wiki/Kolumbusplatz_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Kolumbusplatz (Munich U-Bahn)"), located across the river.

### Am alten Südfriedhof

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Am alten Südfriedhof")]

This quarter is located east of Lindwurmstraße and north of Kapuzinerstraße. In the east, it is bounded by the Alter Südfriedhof (lit. "Old Southern Cemetery"), where numerous illustrious *Münchner* are buried. The quarter is residential in character, although on the north end of Thalkirchner Straße, towards Sendlinger Tor, there are a few bars and restaurants. The closest subway station is Sendlinger Tor, in the north of the quarter.

### Glockenbachviertel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Glockenbachviertel")]

It is often claimed that the Glockenbachviertel is the heart of Isarvorstadt. Indeed, it is the most vibrant part of the borough, with bars, restaurants, and nightclubs straddling Blumenstraße, [Müllerstraße](/wiki/M%C3%BCllerstra%C3%9Fe "Müllerstraße"), Hans-Sachs-Straße, and Klenzestraße. The Glockenbachviertel, together with the adjacent Gärtnerplatzviertel, is also the focal point of Munich's gay culture, with gay bars and clubs located primarily along Müllerstraße. The official dividing line between the two quarters is the [Fraunhoferstraße](/wiki/Fraunhoferstra%C3%9Fe "Fraunhoferstraße"). The nearest subway stations are Sendlinger Tor and [Fraunhoferstraße](/wiki/Fraunhoferstra%C3%9Fe_(Munich_U-Bahn) "Fraunhoferstraße (Munich U-Bahn)").

### Gärtnerplatzviertel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Gärtnerplatzviertel")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/34/G%C3%A4rtnerplatz_vom_Theater.jpg/250px-G%C3%A4rtnerplatz_vom_Theater.jpg)](/wiki/File:G%C3%A4rtnerplatz_vom_Theater.jpg)

Gärtnerplatz

The centrepiece of this quarter is the eponymous *Gärtnerplatz*, a landscaped urban square arranged as a roundabout. The square is home to cafés, bars, [The Seven](/wiki/The_Seven_(Munich) "The Seven (Munich)"), and the [Staatstheater am Gärtnerplatz](/wiki/Staatstheater_am_G%C3%A4rtnerplatz "Staatstheater am Gärtnerplatz"), one of Munich's prime theatre locations.

### Am Deutschen Museum

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ludwigsvorstadt-Isarvorstadt&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Am Deutschen Museum")]

Publicly seen as part of the Gärtnerplatzviertel, Am Deutschen Museum encompasses the western shore of the River [Isar](/wiki/Isar "Isar") and the *Museumsinsel*, an island in the river where the world-famous [Deutsches Museum](/wiki/Deutsches_Museum "Deutsches Museum") is located, as well as the [Blitz Club](/wiki/Blitz_Club "Blitz Club"). The tramway line 18 crosses the river there, and the nearest S-Bahn station is [Isartor](/wiki/Isartor "Isartor").
